name: ResearchSynth
description: Built an autonomous multi-agent research platform using LangGraph with Search, Translation, and Synthesis agents to generate structured markdown research reports with citations from natural language queries. Engineered an async distributed backend using FastAPI, Celery, Redis, async SQLAlchemy, and PostgreSQL.

name: Smart Finance AI
description: Multi-Server MCP platform with isolated microservices for financial math, investment simulation, expense analysis, and inline Base64 chart generation. FastAPI + LangChain orchestrator with session memory, intelligent tool routing, and real-time SSE token streaming.

name: CodeLens
description: Developed a 6-agent CrewAI code review system with specialized agents for bug detection, security analysis, performance optimization, best practices, automated fixing, and architectural review across code snippets and full GitHub repositories.

name: Vehicle Insurance Prediction
description: Built a production-ready MLOps pipeline processing 50k+ vehicle records. Integrated MongoDB Atlas for scalable dataset versioning, used AWS S3 for model tracking, and implemented CI/CD with GitHub Actions & Docker to cut deployment time by 80% via automated AWS EC2 + ECR workflows.
